heading: cyInstalments
amountQuestion: cyHow much could you afford to pay in addition to the current rent?
frequencyQuestion: cyHow frequently could you afford to pay this amount?

errors.installmentAmount: cyEnter how much you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent
errors.installmentAmountFormat: cyEnter an amount in the correct format, for example 148.00 or 148.50
errors.installmentAmountMax: cyThe amount you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent must be less than £1 billion
errors.installmentAmountMin: cyThe amount you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent must be £0.00 or above
errors.installmentFrequency: cySelect how frequently you could afford to pay this amount
